products.title: 18K Gold-Plated Chunky Hoop Earrings
products.description: Bold, lightweight hoops with a smooth 18K gold-plated finish. Hypoallergenic stainless steel base — safe for sensitive ears and tarnish-resistant for everyday wear.

products.title: Freshwater Pearl Drop Pendant Necklace
products.description: A single freshwater pearl suspended on a delicate gold-plated chain. Timeless, minimal, and endlessly layerable.

products.title: Cubic Zirconia Tennis Bracelet
products.description: A classic line of brilliant-cut cubic zirconia set in rhodium plating. Adjustable clasp for a secure, comfortable fit.

products.title: Minimalist Signet Ring
products.description: A smooth, modern signet ring in gold-plated stainless steel. Wear it stacked or on its own.

products.title: Dainty Huggie Earring Set (3 Pairs)
products.description: A curated set of three huggie earring pairs — perfect for a stacked, curated ear. Gold-plated and hypoallergenic.

products.title: Layered Chain Necklace
products.description: The layered look in one piece — no tangling. Three graduated gold-plated chains on a single clasp.
